use_cases: Toggle between light and dark theme modes in web applications
Provide user preference for visual comfort in low-light or bright environments
Add animated UI feedback when switching application color schemes
Enhance brand polish with smooth motion transitions during theme changes
ai_summary: An animated theme toggle component that switches between light and dark modes using next-themes integration. Features a solar switch design with smooth morphing animations for sun and moon icons. Uses Framer Motion for fluid transitions and includes proper hydration handling to prevent SSR mismatches. Includes hover states, focus-visible accessibility features, and ARIA labels for screen readers.
